---
title: "var_ident"
generated: true
description: "Per-stratum residual variance function (`nlme` `varIdent`)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.lme`](../nitrix-stats-lme.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.stats.lme._varfunc`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:var_ident -->
```python
var_ident(strata: Float[Array, 'N']) -> VarFunc
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:var_ident -->
Per-stratum residual variance function (`nlme` `varIdent`).

Fits a separate residual variance for each stratum,
$\operatorname{Var}(\varepsilon_i) = \sigma_e^2 \exp(2 \tau_{s(i)})$.
`strata` is an integer factor with levels `0 .. S-1`; the first level is
the reference ($\tau_0 = 0$, $g = 1$), leaving $S - 1$ free
parameters, with $\log g_i = \tau_{s(i)}$.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:var_ident -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `strata` | `Float` | `N` | — | The `(N,)` stratum factor, one integer-valued level per observation in `0 .. S-1`. The number of strata $S$ is inferred as one plus the maximum level; level `0` is the reference. |

**Returns** `VarFunc`. A variance-function record named `'varIdent'` with $S - 1$ parameters, carrying the stratum index as its covariate and the stratum-lookup log-scale map.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:var_ident -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `N` | observations — time points, subjects, or sampled points |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
